_comment: Org settings for UNCLASSIFIED systems. Findings that are N/A on unclassified networks.

notApplicable.reason: NSA Type 1 cryptography is only required on classified systems. Unclassified systems use FIPS 140-2 validated modules.

orgDefined.setting: DoD Interoperability cross-certs in Untrusted store
orgDefined.value: Required — import via FBCA cross-cert remover + manual .cer files
orgDefined.reason: Unclassified systems must distrust Federal Bridge cross-certificates.

orgDefined.setting: CCEB Interoperability cross-certs in Untrusted store
orgDefined.value: Required — import CCEB2 cross-certs to Disallowed store
orgDefined.reason: Unclassified systems must distrust CCEB interoperability cross-certificates.
